Course Title: Using AI in Client Reports Safely
Category: Finance & Professional Services: Banking, Insurance, Accounting, Consulting, Legal, Real Estate
Who is this for: Account managers, client relationship managers, consultants, financial advisors, auditors, tax preparers, paralegals, analysts, project managers, anyone preparing client-facing reports
Team or Dept this is for: Finance, Accounting, Consulting, Legal, Client Services, Business Development, Risk Management, Compliance
Description: Preventing leakage or inaccuracies in deliverables.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with client report writing and a general awareness of AI tools such as ChatGPT or Microsoft Copilot is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks of using AI tools in client-facing reports, including data leakage, factual inaccuracies, and confidentiality breaches common in finance and professional services. You will also be able to apply practical safeguards to review, verify, and organise AI-generated content so that your deliverables remain accurate, compliant, and safe to share with clients.
